---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new skill for the repo
title: "[Skill] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What problem should this skill solve?

## Intended user
Who is this for?

## Proposed input
What should the user provide?

## Proposed output
What should the skill return?

## Why this belongs in this repo
Explain why this is practical for local Gemma / Edge Gallery style usage.

## Optional example
Add one realistic example input if possible.
